title: Databar Conditional Formatting
author: ahmadjawidjami
body:
## 💬 Questions and Help

Hello,

I can't figure out how to conditionally format cells using dataBars. Conditional Formatting using dataBars seems to have been added in version 3.6.0, however I can't find any example how to use it. 
I need to add a green background (or foreground) color to a cell based on it's value. If the value is 0.3, 30% of the cell's color becomes green; if the value is 0.5, half of cell's color becomes green; If it's 1, then all of the cell's color becomes green and so on.

Any help will be appreciated.

comments.author: BjoernBoba
comments.body:
Hi Ahmad,

were you able to resolve your issue? I am also struggling with setting up a databar as conditional formatting for some cells.

Thanks!

comments.author: ahmadjawidjami
gianam65
comments.body: Hi @ahmadjawidjami. I am also facing databar problem, i have consulted your source code but it doesn't seem to work with version 4.3. Can you tell me what version you use.
